EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} was failed to login into the system on host {event_src.host} via protocol {protocol.layer7}
User was failed to login into the system on host {event_src.host} using console
The user {subject.account.name} was failed to login into the system on host {event_src.host} using console
User from host {src.host} was failed to login into the system on host {event_src.host} via protocol {protocol.layer7}
